data.name: Sweet Hospital 2
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Hospital 2 - 一款以醫院為題的簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，五位漂亮可愛的醫護女孩的工作日常，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後便可以在畫廊中欣賞女孩的照片。

- 遊戲有三個難度 2x2、2x4、4x4 難度的拼圖

- 於拼圖時按"F"鍵開啟黑白圖

- 玩家在遊戲過程中按下 '空白' 鍵即可完成拼圖。

- 玩家可在畫廊中按AD鍵,左右鍵或滑鼠左右鍵快速觀賞女孩圖片

* 拼圖圖片大小為 800x960 px

* 畫廊圖片大小為 1088x960 px

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Hospital 2
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Hospital 2 - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game themed around a hospital. It depicts the daily work lives of five pretty and adorable medical girls, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing a level, you can view the girls' photos in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulty levels: 2x2, 2x4, and 4x4.

- Press "F" during a puzzle to reveal a black and white image.

- Press the 'Space' key during gameplay to complete the puzzle.

- Players can use the A and D keys, left and right mouse buttons, or left and right mouse buttons to quickly view the girls' images in the gallery.

* Puzzle image size: 800x960 px

* Gallery image size: 1088x960 px
